directive: Build a Go module named 'calc'. FIRST run 'go mod init calc' at the repo root so 'go build ./...' works. Then implement package calc: a recursive-descent parser that evaluates arithmetic expression strings supporting + - * / and parentheses with correct operator precedence, returning a clear error on malformed input (unbalanced parens, unexpected tokens, division by zero). Add table-driven unit tests covering precedence, nesting, and the error cases. Make 'go build ./...' and 'go test ./...' both pass from the repo root.
